data.title: Stablecoin payment company RedotPay completes $47 million financing, led by Coinbase Ventures
data.description: Stablecoin payment company RedotPay has completed a $47 million strategic funding round, pushing its valuation past $1 billion and officially becoming a fintech unicorn. This round was led by Coinbase Ventures, with continued support from Galaxy Ventures and Vertex Ventures, as well as participation from an undisclosed global tech entrepreneur. Founded in April 2023, RedotPay provides stablecoin payment cards, multi-currency wallets, and global payment services. To date, the company has over 5 million users and a total payment transaction volume of $10 billion. Its global payment service, launched in June of this year, has made inroads in less-developed regions such as Latin America, enabling direct transfers of cryptocurrencies to local bank accounts or e-wallets. RedotPay is currently headquartered in Hong Kong, with branches in Europe and Argentina. Having obtained licenses in the relevant regions, RedotPay plans to further expand its global business channels, deepen collaborations with banks and payment networks, and prioritize global licensing and regulatory compliance. Earlier news reported that RedotPay had completed a $40 million Series A funding round in March of this year, led by Lightspeed, with participation from HSG and Galaxy Ventures. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Gonka AI's network-wide computing resources reach 500 H100 GPUs
data.description: According to official information, the Gonka network currently boasts computing power equivalent to 500 H100 GPUs. Unlike traditional centralized private clouds, this computing power is distributed and contributed by global participants, forming an open and shared computing network. This avoids monopoly and control by a single institution, and opens new possibilities for the widespread adoption and innovation of high-performance computing. As previously reported, the Gonka mainnet has officially launched, and AI inference services are currently completely free. Contributors receive daily rewards in GNK tokens based on their computing power contribution. 323,000 GNK tokens are minted each epoch, decreasing over time to create a scarcity curve and ensure predictable incentives. Gonka is reportedly incubated by US AI developer Product Science Inc. Founded by the Libermans siblings, Web 2 industry veterans and former core product directors at Snap Inc., the company successfully raised $18 million in 2023 from investors including OpenAI investor Coatue Management, Solana investor Slow Ventures, K5, Insight, and Benchmark Partners. Early contributors to the project include well-known leaders in the Web 2-Web 3 space, such as 6 Blocks, Hard Yaka, Gcore, and Bitfury.

data.title: Digital RMB International Operations Center officially opens in Shanghai
data.description: The Digital RMB International Operations Center has officially begun operations in Shanghai, launching three major business platforms: the Digital RMB Cross-Border Digital Payment Platform, the Blockchain Service Platform, and the Digital Asset Platform. The cross-border digital payment platform aims to address the pain points of traditional cross-border payments; the blockchain service platform provides standardized cross-chain transaction information transfer and on-chain payment services; and the digital asset platform supports the expansion of existing financial infrastructure into on-chain businesses. In June of this year, Pan Gongsheng, Governor of the People's Bank of China, announced the establishment of the center at the Lujiazui Forum to promote the internationalization of the Digital RMB and digital financial innovation. At a promotional event on the 24th, Lu Lei, Deputy Governor of the People's Bank of China, pointed out that the three principles of "losslessness, compliance, and interoperability" have become the basic principles for the construction of cross-border infrastructure for legal digital currencies, and the Digital RMB cross-border financial infrastructure system has been initially established. In the future, the Digital RMB International Operations Center will provide important support for the facilitation of cross-border trade and investment and financing. (Xinhua News Agency)

data.title: TechnoRevenant sold another 377,000 HYPE tokens, worth approximately $16.2 million
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, trader TechnoRevenant began reducing his EVM holdings over the past week, including converting 625,000 KHYPE (valued at $26.6 million) into HYPE. His sell-off caused KHYPE to depreciate by as much as 10% at one point. Estimates suggest his holdings in these EVM protocols range from 1.4 to 1.5 million HYPE (approximately $60 to $65 million). In the past seven hours, he has sold 377,000 HYPE (approximately $16.2 million).

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Bitlight Labs (LIGHT) and GOAT Network (GOATED)
data.description: Binance announced on X that Binance Alpha will be the first platform to feature Bitlight Labs (LIGHT) and GOAT Network (GOATED) on September 27, 2025. Eligible users can claim their airdrops using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page once trading opens. Further details will be announced soon.

data.title: Ethena: S4 points airdrop activity ends, S5 starts today and will last for six months
data.description: Ethena Labs announced in a post on Mirror that the Season 4 airdrop concluded this morning. Season 5 will begin on September 24th, and users have already begun accruing Season 5 points. Similar to previous seasons, users who participated in the Ethena Rewards program will automatically receive bonus rewards for Season 5. Season 5 will last approximately six months. Details on the rewards distribution and specific dates for Season 4 will be announced later. Initial rewards data and preliminary Season 4 statistics will be available on the official website soon.

data.title: Bitcoin News Today: BTC Dips to $111.7K as Liquidations Shake Market
data.description: Key Takeaways:Bitcoin price drops 0.7% amid a broader 1.5% crypto market decline$1.7B in long liquidations mark the largest single-day wipeout since August 2025Fed hawkish tone and stablecoin outflows weaken market confidenceBTC Liquidations Spark SelloffBitcoin’s price dropped by 0.7% over the past 24 hours, falling to $111,779, in line with a broader 1.5% decline in the crypto market. The move was triggered by a massive $1.7 billion liquidation event on September 23–24, the largest daily long liquidation of the year.Open interest remains high at $1.02 trillion, but the sharp breakdown below $113,000 support caused a wave of forced selling across futures platforms. ETH long liquidations also spiked to over $500 million, reflecting excess leverage in altcoin markets.Technical Breakdown Adds PressureFrom a technical standpoint, Bitcoin’s breach of the $113,000–114,000 support zone invalidated a previously forming bullish cup-and-handle pattern. The price is now hovering near its 200-day exponential moving average (EMA) at $103,868, a key long-term support level.Indicators show weakening momentum:MACD histogram: -257.74RSI: Ranging between 42–48Analysts now eye the $106K–108K range as a potential support zone, aligned with the volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for 2025. A reclaim of $113K would be a key signal for stabilization.Macro and Liquidity Drag on SentimentMacroeconomic headwinds are compounding the technical damage. Fed Chair Jerome Powell’s latest remarks reiterated a stance of “restrictive rates for longer,” dampening investor appetite for risk assets. The U.S. dollar index (DXY) rose by 0.15%, further pressuring crypto.In parallel, research from CryptoQuant highlights that liquidity remains sidelined, with stablecoin reserves increasing to $308 billion, but more tokens flowing off exchanges than entering. This reflects a risk-off sentiment and caution among both retail and institutional traders.According to XWIN Research Japan, crypto remains “at the end of the liquidity pipeline,” benefiting only after capital rotations into gold and equities are exhausted. A similar pattern was observed in 2024, where BTC and ETH outperformed only after traditional assets cooled.BTC Outlook: Key Levels & Market Events AheadWhile the $1.7B liquidation may mark a local bottom, the absence of strong inflows and bearish macro signals raise caution. The upcoming $22.6 billion options expiry this Friday could add further volatility.Key levels to watch:$113K: Reclaim could flip sentiment short-term$106K–108K: Strong historical support zone$103.9K: 200-day EMA – last line of trend supportAdditionally, traders are watching U.S. GDP data on September 25, which may impact rate expectations. A weak print could rekindle rate-cut bets and offer temporary relief for digital assets like Bitcoin.

data.title: Capital Group becomes Metaplanet's largest shareholder, with a stake worth $500 million
data.description: Simon Gerovich, CEO of Metaplanet, a Japanese Bitcoin treasury company, announced in a statement that Capital Group has become Metaplanet's largest shareholder, currently holding an 11.45% stake, with a market capitalization of nearly $500 million. Capital Group, a 94-year-old mutual fund giant known for its conservative investing style, has increased its holdings in Bitcoin-related stocks from $1 billion to over $6 billion. According to the Wall Street Journal, Mark Casey, a portfolio manager with 25 years of experience at Capital Group, led the firm's foray into Bitcoin. Casey, who cited Benjamin Graham and Warren Buffett as influences of his investing style, has become a vocal advocate for Bitcoin.

data.title: SharpLink: $500 million in unrealized profits since June 2
data.description: SharpLink stated in a post on the X platform that since the launch of its Ethereum reserve strategy on June 2, 2025, it has currently accumulated $500 million in unrealized profits and has 838,728 ETH on its balance sheet.

data.title: SharpLink Reports $500 Million in Unrealized Profits from Ethereum Strategy
data.description: According to BlockBeats, SharpLink announced that since initiating its Ethereum reserve strategy on June 2, 2025, the company has accumulated $500 million in unrealized profits. This achievement is attributed not only to acquisitions but also to staking nearly 100% of its Ethereum holdings. Currently, SharpLink's balance sheet reflects ownership of 838,728 ETH, enabling the company to maintain strong financial health and generate consistent daily returns.

data.title: M2Capital invests $20 million in Ethena to boost digital asset development in the Middle East
data.description: M2 Capital Limited, the investment arm of UAE-based M2 Holdings, has invested $20 million in Ethena's governance token, ENA. The move underscores the group's efforts to build new digital asset infrastructure in the Middle East and secure a larger role in global finance. Ethena is best known for its crypto-native synthetic dollar, USDe, and its yield-generating version, sUSDe. Both are collateralized by crypto assets and employ hedging strategies to mitigate volatility. Since its launch in 2024, the protocol has attracted over $14 billion in deposits, reflecting strong market demand for products that combine stablecoin features with yield. M2 Global Wealth, an affiliate of M2 Holdings, will add Ethena to its wealth management product portfolio. The group said this provides clients with a regulated way to earn returns from emerging digital assets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Hackers auction Maryland Department of Transportation data for $3.4M BTC
data.description:
Maryland Department of Transportation (MDOT) data is being auctioned on the dark web after the Rhysida ransomware group hacked and stole information from the agency. The hackers are demanding 30 Bitcoins, worth about $3. 4 million, in exchange for the information. As reported by the dailydarkweb news outlet on Wednesday, the breach on the state-level agency […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hackers-auction-maryland-transportation-data/
